title: About the Announcements category
excerpt:

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Be the first to know about new, upcoming, and important announcements and features updates directly from the monday.com team.

This category is where our community team will share all you need to know about platform announcements, community events, feature releases, and more. The community team will be responsible for posting updates and announcements in this section for our community members to comment, ask questions, and discuss!

In additional to the general category, there are two subcategories to make it even easier for community members to stay up-to-date on what’s happening in the world of monday.com.

Announcements subcategories:

  1. Feature releases: Our exclusive feature posts will provide you with an overview of our latest new features, best practices, and industry examples. We will share 3-4 posts weekly, followed by an in-depth feature round up at the end of each month.

  2. Community Events Calendar: We love to host all kinds of digital and in-person events for our community. Here you can stay up to date on all community events including, upcoming new features webinars, AMA (ask me anything) sessions, behind-the-scenes with monday.com employees and more exclusive community events!

posts.author: tranasteiner (t)
posts.cookedHtml: how can i subscribe to get email of new features?
